name: python3-cupshelpers
title: python3-cupshelpers
summary: Python utility modules around the CUPS printing system
description:
Python utility modules around the CUPS printing system
These Python modules, that come from the system-config-printer
distribution, help building applications and utilities around the CUPS
Python bindings.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-cupshelpers because Python utility modules around the CUPS printing system.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-cupshelpers as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-cupshelpers with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-cupshelpers --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
